prestazioni: M177/M178 (4.0L V8 Biturbo) engine: Full Weistec W.4 Stage 3 ECU/TCU flash with custom dyno-tuned 93 octane map, targeting 780whp/720wtq on stock turbos with upgraded Weistec billet compressor wheels and extended tip turbos for reduced backpressure, paired with a Weistec high-flow downpipe (catless) and secondary catalytic converter delete for optimized exhaust flow

Drivetrain: Wavetrac limited-slip differential with 40% lockup under load, paired with an AMG SPEEDSHIFT MCT 9G transmission reinforcement kit (Weistec W.4 valve body upgrade + reinforced clutch packs) and a South Bend Stage 3 twin-disc clutch for M177/M178 applications, ensuring consistent power delivery under extreme boost

Suspension/Handling: Öhlins Road & Track coilovers (TTX46 MkII) with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and ride height), custom-tuned for the AMG GT 4-Door’s 115.9-inch wheelbase, paired with H&R 20mm front and 15mm rear anti-roll bars (stiffer than OEM AMG bars) and polyurethane bushings (Powerflex Black Series) for subframe and control arms to eliminate compliance
estetica: Aero: Prior Design PD800RS widebody kit (carbon fiber) with integrated front splitter, side skirts, and rear diffuser, designed specifically for the AMG GT 4-Door’s C292 chassis, paired with a custom 3D-printed active rear wing (adjustable angle via electric actuators) for downforce tuning at high speeds

Wheels: HRE FF16 flow-formed wheels (20x10.5 +25 front, 21x12.5 +35 rear) in matte bronze finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 325/25/21 rear) for maximum mechanical grip, with custom center-lock adapters for quick swaps

Exterior Details: Full carbon fiber hood (AMG GT 4-Door-specific, not a universal fitment) with integrated heat extractors and a custom matte Selenite Grey Magno paint job (factory code 788U) with a satin clear coat, paired with dechromed trim (replaced with gloss black vinyl wrap) and AMG Night Package II LED taillights with smoked lenses
